testcase.name: Authentication Mock Infrastructure › should create mock user with correct properties
Authentication Mock Infrastructure › should create mock session with valid tokens
Authentication Mock Infrastructure › should mock authentication API responses

failure.message: auth-mock.spec.ts:26:7 should mock authentication API responses

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › auth-mock.spec.ts:26:7 › Authentication Mock Infrastructure › should mock authentication API responses
Error: apiRequestContext.get: connect ECONNREFUSED ::1:54321 Call log: - → GET http://localhost:54321/auth/v1/user - user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/139.0.7258.5 Safari/537.36 - accept: */* - accept-encoding: gzip,deflate,br - Authorization: Bearer test-token
at apiRequestContext.get: connect ECONNREFUSED ::1:54321 at /workspace/apps/e2e-main/tests/auth-mock.spec.ts:34:41
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/auth-mock-Authentication-M-f53f5-uthentication-API-responses-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: Authentication Mock Infrastructure › should mock OAuth flow responses

testcase.name: Authentication Mock Infrastructure › should mock authentication failures
testcase.failure:

Error: apiRequestContext.get: connect ECONNREFUSED ::1:54321 Call log: - → GET http://localhost:54321/auth/v1/user - user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/139.0.7258.5 Safari/537.36 - accept: */* - accept-encoding: gzip,deflate,br - Authorization: Bearer invalid-token

testcase.name: Authentication Mock Infrastructure › should set and clear browser authentication state

failure.message: auth-mock.spec.ts:79:7 should set and clear browser authentication state

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › auth-mock.spec.ts:79:7 › Authentication Mock Infrastructure › should set and clear browser authentication state
